examples: His conversation was larded with Russian proverbs.
Here are other examples of proverbs that Americans use.
He included many proverbs that he had heard or created.
Achebe's stories included proverbs and tackled complex issues of African identity, nationalism and decolonization, adding to his books' popularity.
Of course, the laughter of the book of Proverbs goes deeper than a good joke or a witty reply.
